## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/CI

## Validation

- [ ] App starts successfully (`python main.py`)
- [ ] Related flow tested manually
- [ ] No unrelated behavior regressions found

## UI Changes (if applicable)

- [ ] Screenshot(s) attached
- [ ] Responsive/layout behavior verified

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
